nasb.text: For day and night Your hand was heavy upon me; My vitality was drained away as with the fever heat of summer. Selah.

esv.text: For day and night your hand was heavy upon me; my strength was dried up as by the heat of summer. Selah

cnv.text: 因為你的手晝夜重壓在我身上， 我的精力耗盡，好像盛暑的乾旱。

ccb.text: 你昼夜管教我， 我的精力耗尽， 如水在盛夏枯竭。（细拉）

csbs.text: 因为你的手昼夜重压在我身上， 我的精力耗尽，如同在夏天的干旱中。细拉
